k_EPingMarkerInfo_ShowMarkerAndSound.(schema_friendly_name): Show Ping Indicator at Ping Location, Play Ping Sound, and Play VO

k_EPingMarkerInfo_ShowMarkerOnSender.(schema_friendly_name): Show Ping Indicator on Pinging Player, Play Ping Sound, and Play VO

k_EPingMarkerInfo_OnlyShowMarker.(schema_friendly_name): Only Show Ping Indicator at Ping Location (no ping sound)

k_EPingMarkerInfo_OnlyMiniMap.(schema_friendly_name): Only show on Minimap, no world, no sound
